assertions.assertion: Identifies the missing X-CSRF: 1 header as the root cause
assertions.rationale: General BFF knowledge includes anti-forgery headers, though the specific header name might vary

assertions.assertion: Provides a fetch wrapper or interceptor that adds the X-CSRF: 1 header automatically
assertions.rationale: General web knowledge would suggest creating a fetch wrapper for common headers

assertions.assertion: Shows 401 response handling that redirects to /bff/login
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the specific /bff/login endpoint path or the redirect pattern

assertions.assertion: Mentions that /bff/login and /bff/logout must be browser navigations (window.location.href), not fetch calls
assertions.rationale: This is a specific BFF gotcha that general knowledge would likely not cover explicitly
